reviews.name: Homeowner
reviews.text: Called at 8am with a dead outlet, they were here by noon. Fixed the issue fast and the price was fair. Love the money-back guarantee.

reviews.name: Business Owner
reviews.text: Orland Electric installed EV chargers at our business. Professional, clean, and they handled all the permitting. First-rate service.

reviews.name: Property Manager
reviews.text: We use them for all our commercial properties. Their 24/7 availability and same-day service has saved us multiple times.
